message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam boundary {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam control {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam entity {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam queue {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam usecase {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam participant {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}

actor "ScooterOwner" as scooterowner
boundary "Dashboard" as dashboard
control "BikeService" as bikeservice
control "ClaimsService" as claimsservice
entity "bike" as bike
entity "Claim" as claim

activate scooterowner
activate dashboard
scooterowner -> dashboard : lockBike
activate bikeservice
dashboard -> bikeservice : lockBike(bike)
activate bike
bikeservice -> bike : lockBike(bike)
bike --> bikeservice : bike
deactivate bike
bikeservice --> dashboard : bike
deactivate bikeservice
dashboard --> scooterowner : bike
deactivate dashboard
activate dashboard
scooterowner -> dashboard : unlockBike
activate bikeservice
dashboard -> bikeservice : unlockBike(bike)
activate bike
bikeservice -> bike : unlockBike(bike)
bike --> bikeservice : bike
deactivate bike
bikeservice --> dashboard : bike
deactivate bikeservice
dashboard --> scooterowner : bike
deactivate dashboard
deactivate scooterowner

@enduml
```
